title: Return 0.0 from safe_average for an empty input list
description: The safe_average(values) function is meant to return the arithmetic mean of a list of numbers, and 0.0 when the list is empty. It currently divides by len(values) unconditionally, so calling it with an empty list raises ZeroDivisionError. Guard the empty-list case so the function returns 0.0 (a float) without changing the signature or the behaviour for non-empty inputs.
